rationale: Use identical or an explicit tolerance instead of all.equal in conditions
Use anyDuplicated when only existence is required
Use anyNA when only existence is required
Use inherits for class checks
Do not attach accidental calls to package conditions
Condition messages must be stable and explicit
Duplicate call arguments require explicit review
Reject incomplete assignments
NA comparisons must use is.na
Avoid allocating complete level vectors to count levels
List equality requires explicit element semantics
Reject unintended missing call arguments
Package hooks must use the supported signatures
Native routines must be registered explicitly
Use unambiguous TRUE and FALSE constants
Close terminal connections explicitly
Reject code that cannot execute
Use scalar and vector logical operators intentionally
Track assignment style without bulk churn
Track brace consistency without bulk churn
Track comma placement without bulk churn
Track code-like comments without bulk churn
Track function declaration spacing
Track indentation debt without bulk reformatting
Track infix spacing without bulk churn
Use a practical 120-character package limit
Use a practical 60-character object limit
Allow documented statistical and S3 naming conventions
Track parenthesized body layout
Track mixed pipe styles
Track pipe continuation layout
Track quote consistency without bulk churn
Track redundant explicit returns
Track statement separators without bulk churn
Prefer robust sequence helpers
Track interior delimiter spacing
Track call spacing
Track terminal blank lines
Track trailing whitespace
Track horizontal whitespace consistency
Preserve a reviewed advisory inventory of package and testthat false positives
